description: Sync analytical data from your ClickHouse OLAP database to any Fivetran-supported destination. Optimized for high-volume columnar data extraction.

fields.name: hostname
fields.label: Hostname
fields.description: The hostname or IP address of your ClickHouse server

fields.name: username
fields.label: Username
fields.description: Your ClickHouse username with SELECT privileges

fields.name: database
fields.label: Database Name
fields.description: The ClickHouse database to sync tables from
